title: STOP Using Claude to Code. Do THIS Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese argues that Claude Code is misunderstood as a coding tool when it should instead be the foundation for building a personal AI operating system that learns user workflows and improves over time. The video promotes the concept of owning custom AI systems rather than renting generic AI services.
